query:
SELECT 
  e.id,
  e.corretorId,
  u.name as corretor_nome,
  DATE(e.data) as data_escolha,
  e.aceitouFollowUp,
  DATE(NOW()) as hoje,
  DATE(NOW() - INTERVAL 30 DAY) as trinta_dias_atras,
  CASE 
    WHEN DATE(e.data) >= DATE(NOW() - INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND DATE(e.data) <= DATE(NOW()) THEN 'DENTRO'
    ELSE 'FORA'
  END as status_filtro
FROM escolha_diaria_follow_up e
LEFT JOIN users u ON e.corretorId = u.id
ORDER BY e.createdAt DESC;
